name: Denisse Aniram
tagline: Cuidamos cada detalle para que luzcas espectacular.

hero.headline: Tu Sueño, Nuestro Detalle.
hero.subheadline: Diseños exclusivos para novias y quinceañeras que buscan la perfección en cada costura.

scenes.title: The Masterpiece
scenes.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a luxury wedding dress on a mannequin, dramatic side lighting, dark moody background, silk and lace textures, 8k resolution, elegant atmosphere, golden rim light.
scenes.animation: Slow cinematic zoom into the lace details, subtle light shifts across the fabric.

scenes.title: The Details
scenes.prompt: Macro shot of silver crystals being sewn onto white silk fabric, hands of a seamstress visible, soft focus background, warm workshop lighting, high fashion photography style.
scenes.animation: Camera pans slowly across the crystals, following the needle movement, sparkling reflections.

scenes.title: The Celebration
scenes.prompt: Elegant silhouette of a girl in a large purple quinceañera dress, grand ballroom with bokeh lights in the background, cinematic wide shot, low angle, royal atmosphere.
scenes.animation: Subtle camera pull back, revealing the scale of the dress and the ballroom lights shimmering.
